== Notes for [[Item:Q107322|Q107322]] ==

* '''1st Abbasid Governor of Syria'''

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abdallah_ibn_Ali

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Al-Mansur

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Salih_ibn_Ali

Source 4: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sulayman_ibn_Ali

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000025181720979

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
